name: Southwestern Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chopped orange or yellow pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Stir together chips and butter in a small bowl; press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake for 15 minutes.
4. Beat cream cheese and eggs in a large mixing bowl at medium speed with an electric mixer until well blended.
5. Mix in shredded cheese and chilies; pour over the crust.
6. Bake for 30 minutes.
7. Spread sour cream over cheesecake.
8. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan.
9. Chill.
10. Top with remaining ingredients just before serving.
